calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2004 Continued To Apr-12-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Arnold Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff: M. Amin.
No appearance by the Defendant: Charles Davis.
09:30 am. - Mr. Amin was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice---------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 74 Sixth St., #229, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $970.00
Costs of $148.30
For the total of $1,118.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff, A. Amin
No appearance by Defendant, Charles Davis

Settlement Conference off calendar. No appearance by defendant. Jury trial vacated. Court trial remains in Presiding Judge's Dept. on April 12, 2004

JPT: Comm. Sue M. Kaplan Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter
